decisions.title: Cowboy reputation
decisions.summary: The reputation plugin is on at launch. Wanted posters, bounties, pacifist knockout. The works.

decisions.title: mcMMO
decisions.summary: Full mcMMO is on at launch. Every skill, no lite version. Specific rates may get tuned post-launch.

decisions.title: Graves
decisions.summary: Death drops your inventory into a grave at the spot. Graves despawn the moment you empty them.

decisions.title: Keep inventory
decisions.summary: Off. Vanilla rules. Graves catch your stuff so dying isn't a wipe.

decisions.title: PvP
decisions.summary: On in the wilderness. Lands claims are the safe zones. Your home is your home.

decisions.title: Mob griefing
decisions.summary: Vanilla in the wilderness (creepers blow stuff up). Off inside Lands claims by default.

decisions.title: Sleep to skip night
decisions.summary: 50% of online players in bed skips the night.

decisions.title: Phantoms
decisions.summary: Reduced spawn rate. They still show up, just not nightly.

decisions.title: Player heads
decisions.summary: Drop from PvP kills only. Mob and environment deaths don't drop heads.

decisions.title: World border pace
decisions.summary: Slower expansion. Playtime thresholds scale with the active-player count so growth has to be earned.

decisions.title: Server difficulty
decisions.summary: Hard. Hunger drains, zombies break doors, you know the drill.

decisions.title: Nether unlock
decisions.summary: Open day one. Closest vote of the bunch (7 to 6), so it stays a community call.

decisions.title: Playtime gating
decisions.summary: Soft gates only. Border pace already pulls most of the weight here.

decisions.title: First event theme
decisions.summary: Community boss raid won. Format is still being built. First one likely in the opening weeks.

decisions.title: Event cadence
decisions.summary: Weekly was the vote. Realistically targeting every two weeks until the cadence proves itself.

decisions.title: Quests plugin
decisions.summary: Yes won, but not day one. Looking for the right plugin and format first.

decisions.title: Jobs plugin
decisions.summary: Coming after the economy is in. Not day one.

decisions.title: End unlock
decisions.summary: End stays locked at launch regardless of the vote. A focused poll on opening conditions is coming once people settle in.
